trivia_bullets.text: First printing, no reprints. Soft-deterrent enchantment: any creature attacking you costs its controller 1 life / gains you 1 life per attacker.

Flavor text: 'Syr Tasdale declared that he never wanted to see the witch Ygretta again. Her familiars quickly granted his request.' Dark comedy payoff — the wish is granted literally. Syr Tasdale also speaks the flavor text on Deafening Silence (ELD 10), making him the only named mortal figure bridging a white Ardenvale card and a black Wilds-adjacent card in the set.

Ygretta is named only in this flavor text — she has no named creature card in ELD. One of several barrow-witch figures referenced across the set's black cards who exist only in flavor text, not as Legendary permanents.
sources: Scryfall; WebSearch: Eldraine lore via thegamerslodge.com

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 2,760 — one of the stronger performers among the ELD black cards in this batch. Cumulative life-swing in pillow-fort and life-gain Commander strategies.

related_cards.name: Deafening Silence
related_cards.note: Syr Tasdale speaks the flavor text on both cards — traces his narrative arc across white and black

related_cards.name: Barrow Witches
related_cards.note: Depicts the witch faction Ygretta belongs to
